category_sources: Official netaddr documentation says it represents and manipulates IP and MAC network addresses.
source_facts.description says network address manipulation library.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub repository use netaddr.
docs_sources: Official documentation includes API reference and CLI tool reference.
source_facts.homepage is the official Read the Docs documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README lists https://github.com/netaddr/netaddr/ as the source code repository.
Official netaddr documentation Project links list Source code repository on GitHub.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include python, networking, ipv4, ipv6, ip-address, subnet, and cidr.
Official documentation describes IPv4/IPv6 addresses, subnets, CIDR ranges, and IP set operations.
